story: World Cup 2026: Breel Embolo sent off as result of mistaken identity rule - BBC
title: Mistaken Identity Changes Game
script: Breel Embolo is sent off by mistake. This shocking call changes the game's momentum significantly as Embolo's team suffers from the loss of a key player. The referee's error has major implications for the World Cup semifinals, potentially altering the bracket predictions and outcomes. Embolo's team must now regroup and adapt without him, a difficult task in such a high-stakes tournament. What will happen to his team's chances of advancing now?
